sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ رِيمُ دِينَارًا عَلَى الأَرْضِ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Rim je pronašla dinar na ulici.
sentences.translationEn: Reem found a coin on the ground in the street.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَتْ حَوْلَهَا لِتَعْرِفَ إِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ قَدْ أَسْقَطَهُ.
sentences.translation: Pogledala je unaokolo da vidi je li ga neko ispustio.
sentences.translationEn: She looked around to see if anyone had dropped it.

sentences.translation: Nije pronašla nikoga pa ga je dala majci.
sentences.translationEn: She found no one so she gave it to her mother.

sentences.translation: Majka je pohvalila kćer zbog njene poštenja.
sentences.translationEn: The mother praised her daughter for her honesty.
